tools.name: airbnb_search
tools.description: Search for Airbnb listings with various filters and pagination. Provide direct links to the user

location.description: Location to search for (city, state, etc.)

placeId.description: Google Maps Place ID (overrides the location parameter)

propertyType.description: Filter by property type: 'entire_home' (entire homes/apartments), 'private_room' (private rooms in shared homes), 'shared_room' (shared/dorm-style rooms), 'hotel_room' (hotel rooms)

ignoreRobotsText.description: Ignore robots.txt rules for this request

tools.name: airbnb_listing_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Airbnb listing. Provide direct links to the user

ignoreRobotsText.description: Ignore robots.txt rules for this request
